title: Add F-WIN-05: satellite focus race on multi-monitor
agent_notes: Observed on a two-monitor Windows setup; hypothetical pending user test.

hunks.before:
# Failure Paths: Tauri Window Management

## F-WIN-05 — Satellite focus race on multi-monitor

The satellite window sometimes opens behind the main window.
hunks.after:
# Failure Paths: Tauri Window Management

## F-WIN-05 — Satellite focus race on multi-monitor

**Feature scope**: `DockSystem.js` satellite creation on multi-monitor setups.

The satellite window sometimes opens behind the main window when the second
monitor is the active display. Calling `setFocus()` synchronously after
`WebviewWindow` creation, before the OS has mapped the frame, is a no-op.

**Fix**: await the window `tauri://created` event, then `setFocus()`.
